textByHash.2a38f3fbc36f92e6f5ac7277b04b1f1a737cc0aa: He informed me of your problem traveller. I would be glad to help, I have a rope ladder and my associate, Kilron, is waiting on the other side.
textByHash.1b49b04b37f0301a2eed48dc62a7dd8e1f661187: Unfortunately we can't risk it with the watchtower so close. So first we need to distract the guards in the tower.
textByHash.20d9a4e573b71e84ba4221a3c6e6203a873cd95c: I reckon some of Jerico's pigeons might help us out here. Chuck some bird feed at the tower and then release some pigeons nearby. They should provide a nice distraction.
textByHash.23d50e0fae1e7d1bd62f86428bfdfb677c00a096: I'm sure Jerico can help you out with that if you ask him nicely.
textByHash.23de3aa80cb1c66dabe5c089f7b3c3b130acbe5a: Hello. Have you sorted that distraction yet?
textByHash.630174f31884f6b0148335e7d0b14328e6ffab5f: Try using some of Jerico's pigeons. Chuck some bird feed at the tower and then release some pigeons nearby. Jerico should be able to help you out.
textByHash.4bd7eeb4f1a2bf12067a599715d5908eff3f09c3: Well done, the guards are having real trouble with those birds. You must go now traveller, it's your only chance.
textByHash.eb62750a8560dd5801f87a93c232a29beba6667d: I'd recommend you wear a gas mask before entering West Ardougne. You don't want to risk catching the plague.
textByHash.54a2a9d08c111a3484ee37df807692a738c7e1ec: Don't take too long, those mourners will soon be rid of those birds.
textByHash.034b1737bc8157025a99eb7d36fc35bd11ce6db2: Hello traveller. Do you wish to cross the wall?
textByHash.b7d846787ff73a13b3eeff74b79b6bdd41af0c08: Hello adventurer. I'm afraid it's too risky to use the ladder again. You'll have to find another way into the city.
textByHash.0014aa714d8be642f25443c62c9d78ab4ba398c8: We did have an idea. With the plague, lots of people are worried for their health. We could take advantage of that.
textByHash.34c84b1fda8ae418ed15f3141ecd8252da7080a3: Imagine if the king made a new law stating that all doctors and nurses in Ardougne had to retrain. They'd be out of action for months.
textByHash.9ce24afc41242b721ce7a43d2a3c1d778c622f03: Look who we found hiding in a wardrobe.
